title: Shadows of the Empire (disambiguation)
content:
'''Shadows of the Empire''' may refer to:

==Out of universe==
*'''[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]''', The multimedia project
**Novels
***'''[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Shadows of the Empire'']]''' {{C|[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (unabridged audiobook)|unabridged audiobook]], [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (abridged audiobook)|abridged audiobook]]}}, novel by [[Steve Perry]]
***'''[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (junior novelization)|''Shadows of the Empire'']]''', junior novelization of the novel by [[Christopher Golden]]
**Comics
***'''[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (comic series)|''Shadows of the Empire'']]''' {{C|[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (trade paperback)|TPB]]) ([[Star Wars Omnibus: Shadows of the Empire|Omnibus]]}}, a [[Dark Horse Comics]] miniseries written by [[John Wagner]]
***'''''[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire: Evolution]]''''' {{C|[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire: Evolution (trade paperback)|TPB]]}}, a Dark Horse comics miniseries written by [[Steve Perry]]
***'''Kenner Shadows of the Empire Special''' {{C|[[Kenner Shadows of the Empire Special (Part 1)|Part 1]]) ([[Kenner Shadows of the Empire Special (Part 2)|Part 2]]}}, two-part tie-in comics by [[John Wagner]]
***'''[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire Galoob minicomic |''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'']]''', a mini comic book included with some [[Galoob]] Micro-Machines
***'''[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire Ertl minicomic|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'']]''', a mini comic book included with some [[Ertl]] model kits
**Reference material
***'''''[[Shadows of the Empire Sourcebook]]''''', a roleplaying guidebook for the ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''
***'''''[[Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide]]''''', a roleplaying guidebook for the ''Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game''
***'''''[[The Secrets of Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]''''', a reference book written by [[Mark Cotta Vaz]]
**Video game
***'''[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (video game)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'']]''', a video game developed by [[LucasArts]]
****'''''[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire: The Official Strategy Guide]]''''', a strategy guide for the video game
****'''''[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire: Game Secrets]]''''', a strategy guide for the video game
****'''''[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire Limited Collector's Edition]]''''', a strategy guide for the video game
**Soundtrack
***'''[[Shadows of the Empire (soundtrack)|''Shadows of the Empire'']]''', A music album composed by [[Joel McNeely]]
**Toys
***'''[[1996 Topps Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]''', a collectible series of trading cards by [[Topps]]
***'''[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (toy line)|Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]''', a toy line was released by [[Hasbro]]
***'''[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire Micro Machines]]''', a toy line was manufactured by [[Galoob]]
***'''[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire Embossed Metal Collector Cards]]''', a limited edition set of six trading cards released by [[Metallic Impressions]]
**Other
***'''[[A Book Excerpt|Shadows of the Empire]]''', an excerpt of the novel published in [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 7]]

==Also see==
*[[Shadow|Shadow (disambiguation)]]
*[[Empire (disambiguation)]]
